addedOutputFields.name: viewer
addedOutputFields.description: Self-contained scrollable document viewer (equations as native MathML when python-hwpx[preview] is present) with honest fidelity-tier counts; emitted only when viewer=true.

coreDependency.failClosed: viewer=true against a core build without the viewer raises RENDER_PREVIEW_VIEWER_UNAVAILABLE; MathML absence fails closed to a LaTeX/script code block (never a silent drop). MIN_PYTHON_HWPX stays 3.3.1 in this branch.

proof: Holding version coordinates, classification, counts, domains, and every other tool fixed, the canonical payload delta is confined to render_preview: its inputSchema gains one optional boolean property (viewer, default false) and its outputSchema gains one optional object property (viewer -> RenderPreviewViewer $def). No tool is added, removed, renamed, or reclassified; mutation/profile/skill-required flags are unchanged. Regenerating the ToolSpec docs moved exactly one row: docs/tool-contract.md changed only the render_preview schema-hash cell plus the header contract hash; docs/tool-contract.generated.json changed no tool 'name' entry and only added the viewer input/output schema fragments plus the top-level contractHash. Contract hash f82caecbcfc742e9 -> c89cbc5f98eb5367.
